checks.name: telegram-lookup-classification
checks.detail: Installer now separates missing token, invalid-token API rejection, and recoverable getMe lookup failures, and keeps already-known bot usernames for pair guidance when lookup is the only failing layer.

checks.name: codex-path-recovery
checks.detail: Bootstrap now retries Codex readiness through detected npm wrapper paths and downgrades runnable wrapper cases to a CODEX_PATH_PENDING warning instead of a missing-Codex cascade failure.

checks.name: installer-warning-vs-failure-ux
checks.detail: Installer results stay at warning level when Telegram getMe and post-checks only surface follow-up PATH issues, while real invalid-token and true missing-Codex cases remain distinguishable.

checks.name: verification-commands
checks.detail: Targeted runtime-adapters/bootstrap tests, full build/lint/typecheck/test all passed. Doctor/verify were also executed and still show only the expected local .env/Telegram/Redis findings of this checkout.
